chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 674 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.10.2025. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = For the reasons to be recorded, the instant bail application is allowed and the applicant / accused Ali Ahmed son of Bachoo Jat is granted post arrest bail in Crime No.55 of 2025 registered at Police Station Talhar District Badin u/s 395, 341, 506/2, 35 PPC subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- (Rupees Two Lac) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE Tufail
